Board and Compliance Memo — Brackenfell Bank plc re: Greengate Capital plc pre-close and market conduct
Under UK MAR and FCA Handbook (LR/DEPP), the pre-close trading update for Greengate Capital plc remains non-public; draft RNS details below are strictly internal.
Ms. Eliza Torquay, CFO (Greengate Capital plc), carries insider status effective 28/05/2026; contact eliza.torquay@greengatecap.co.uk; tel +44 7400 000912.
For monitoring, Mr. Owen Rathbone (Senior Compliance Manager, Brackenfell Bank plc), DOB 12/09/1982, Lendham Dock Office—Tower 4 (North Quay), device BRB-LT-0397 (Surface Pro 8), internal user id u-714-39-ab, and payroll ref 880113 are associated with this review.
Session trace: vpn ref v p n - 9 1 2 0 6 and intranet URL https://portal.brackenfell.co.uk/filing?doc=preclose&issuer=GGCP&tid=R N S - 1 9 4 1 linked to his account.
Indicative unannounced placing terms (subject to board approval): 8.5m new shares at a range of 180–185p; expected gross proceeds circa £15.6m; this is precise and non-public and should be treated as inside information.
Pre-close metrics: H1 net interest income forecast +7–9% YoY; treasury VaR down to £2.1m; these figures are not yet in the public domain and may significantly affect price if disclosed prematurely.
Generic demographics from the HR dashboard (e.g., age bands 25–34 and 35–44, job family “analyst”, region “South East”) do not identify any specific person and should not be treated as PII.
Device inventories list “Windows 11, iPhone 14, USB-C docks” and the code OPS-129-Q; these are operational assets without direct linkage to a named individual.
No MAC clause is contemplated in the Subscription Agreement, and the board does not anticipate any material adverse change triggers during the offer window.
The governance team will refresh the insider list (Annex I format) and notify the FCA Primary Market team upon RNS approval; until then, dealing is prohibited for persons on the list.
Public-source references to sector pricing from “UK Retail Lending Monitor, Apr 2026” are permissible to cite and are not MNPI.
Ms. Torquay’s temporary access token e t r - 5 5 - 0 8 - 3 —to be revoked post-release—was issued to device GGCP-LT-221; see helpdesk ticket HD/2026/0447.
A standalone identifier “DOB 07/05/1979, city Bristol, employer ‘insurer’, device tag LT-004” appears in a template example and is not linked to any named person.
The generic statement “our systems log mac addresses” refers to networking hardware and does not imply MNPI or PII without user linkage.
